zh.lifeSummary: 當Mathilde de Mayenne於1093年2月20日出生在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥延時，她的父親Gauthier IV de Mayenne38歲，母親Alix de Beaugency de Presles18歲。她於1115年與Hugues II duc de Bourgogne在法國布格o-達波奧結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1162年2月16日在法國布格o-達馬-利斯-維勒斯享年68歲，埋葬在法國布格o-達波奧。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mathilde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Matilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Mathilde de Mayenne was born on 20 February 1093, in Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France, her father, Gauthier IV de Mayenne, was 38 and her mother, Alix de Beaugency de Presles, was 18. She married Hugues II duc de Bourgogne in 1115, in Beaune, Côte-d'Or, Burgundy, France. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 7 daughters. She died on 16 February 1162, in Magny-lès-Villers, Côte-d'Or, Burgundy, France, at the age of 68, and was buried in Beaune, Côte-d'Or, Burgundy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mathilde de Mayenne est née le 20 février 1093, à Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France, son père, Gauthier IV de Mayenne, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Alix de Beaugency de Presles, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Hugues II duc de Bourgogne en 1115, à Beaune, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, France. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée le 16 février 1162, à Magny-lès-Villers, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, France, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterrée à Beaune, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, France.

de.Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France: Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich
de.lifeSummary: Als Mathilde de Mayenne am 20. Februar 1093 in Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gauthier IV de Mayenne 38 und ihre Mutter Alix de Beaugency de Presles 18. Sie hat 1115 in Beaune, Côte-d'Or, Burgund, Frankreich Hugues II duc de Bourgogne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb am 16. Februar 1162 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Magny-lès-Villers, Côte-d'Or, Burgund, Frankreich und wurde in Beaune, Côte-d'Or, Burgund, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mathilde de Mayenne è nata il il 20 febbraio 1093 nel Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Francia, sua padre, Gauthier IV de Mayenne, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Alix de Beaugency de Presles, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Hugues II duc de Bourgogne nel 1115, nel Beaune, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 16 febbraio 1162, nel Magny-lès-Villers, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, Francia, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolta a Beaune, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Mathilde de Mayenneが1093年2月20日にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーメイエンで生まれた時，父Gauthier IV de Mayenneは38歳，母Alix de Beaugency de Preslesは18歳であった。1115年にフランスボウルゴグンクoテ-ド'オルビーウンでHugues II duc de Bourgogneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1162年2月16日にフランスボウルゴグンクoテ-ド'オルマグニー-ルeス-ヴィラーズで68歳で死去し，フランスボウルゴグンクoテ-ド'オルビーウンにて埋葬された。

ko.Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 메이니
ko.lifeSummary: Mathilde de Mayenne(이)가 1093년 2월 20일 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 메이니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gauthier IV de Mayenne(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alix de Beaugency de Presles(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1115년 프랑스 부르고그니 co테-드'어 보니에서 Hugues II duc de Bourgogne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1162년 2월 16일 프랑스 부르고그니 co테-드'어 매그니-e스-비레르스에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 부르고그니 co테-드'어 보니에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mathilde de Mayenne nasceu em 20 de fevereiro de 1093, em Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, França, seu pai, Gauthier IV de Mayenne, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Alix de Beaugency de Presles, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Hugues II duc de Bourgogne em 1115, em Beaune, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em 16 de fevereiro de 1162, em Magny-lès-Villers, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, França, com 68 anos, e foi sepultada em Beaune, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, França.

ru.Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France: меиенн, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mathilde de Mayenne родилась 20 февраля 1093 г. в местности меиенн, пеис де ла лоир, Франция, её отцу по имени Gauthier IV de Mayenne было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Alix de Beaugency de Presles, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugues II duc de Bourgogne в 1115 г. в местности бон, кoте-д'ор, бургогн, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Она умерла 16 февраля 1162 г. в местности магни-лeс-виллирс, кoте-д'ор, бургогн, Франция в возрасте 68 лет и была похоронена в местности бон, кoте-д'ор, бургогн, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mathilde de Mayenne nació el 20 de febrero de 1093, en Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Francia, su papá, Gauthier IV de Mayenne, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Alix de Beaugency de Presles, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Hugues II duc de Bourgogne en 1115, en Beaune, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 16 de febrero de 1162, en Magny-lès-Villers, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, Francia, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultada en Beaune, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, Francia.
